findings.title: Stale MCP tool references in SKILL.md
findings.defect: Documentation emphasizes CLI interface when YAML workflows use direct script invocation
findings.impact: Could confuse operators about integration path
findings.recommendation: Add note clarifying YAML workflow script invocation path

findings.title: Missing error handling in score-candidate.cjs profile generation
findings.defect: Generic error message doesn't distinguish between file not found, parse error, or script crash
findings.impact: Operators cannot debug profile generation failures
findings.recommendation: Propagate actual error from runScript or check file existence first

findings.title: Silent NaN fallback in 5-dimension scoring
findings.defect: Returns score:100 with maxPossible:0 when no checks exist, creating division-by-zero risk
findings.impact: Misleading perfect scores and potential NaN in weighted calculation
findings.recommendation: Return score:0 or null when no checks exist, guard weighted calculation

findings.title: Hardcoded timeout in script execution
findings.defect: 15-second timeout hardcoded, may be insufficient for complex agents or large repos
findings.impact: Silent timeout failures mask performance issues
findings.recommendation: Make timeout configurable via env var or flag, log timeout errors explicitly

findings.title: Missing validation in mutation-coverage signature dedup
findings.defect: No validation that required fields are non-empty before computing signature
findings.impact: Empty fields produce identical signatures for different mutations
findings.recommendation: Add validation for required fields, return sentinel for invalid inputs

findings.title: Inconsistent stop reason enum usage
findings.defect: SKILL.md says plateau is invalid but README.md documents it as dedicated stop reason
findings.impact: Documentation contradiction creates confusion about valid stop reasons
findings.recommendation: Reconcile documentation - add plateau to enum or remove from README

findings.title: YAML workflow uses incorrect manifest path
findings.defect: References target-manifest.jsonc but actual file is target_manifest.jsonc (underscore)
findings.impact: Workflow fails to find manifest file, causing initialization failures
findings.recommendation: Update YAML to use target_manifest.jsonc to match asset filename

findings.title: Missing test coverage for promotion gate boundaries
findings.defect: No test files for promote-candidate.cjs to verify boundary conditions
findings.impact: Complex promotion validation gates have no automated test coverage
findings.recommendation: Add test coverage for promote-candidate.cjs covering all validation gates

findings.title: Integration scanner path hardcoding
findings.impact: Command scanning fails to find files, produces empty coverage results
findings.recommendation: Update path to .opencode/commands to match actual directory structure
